basic_details.job_title: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Tata Institute of Social Sciences (TISS) has officially announced the Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification has been published on the official website, tiss.ac.in. Candidates possessing a Master's degree with 55% marks in the relevant discipline and NET/ SLET/ SET or a Ph.D. as per UGC regulations are eligible to submit their online applications on or before 20 August 2026. Direct links to download the official notification PDF and apply online are shared below.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in relevant disciplines, NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC regulations
qualification.details: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in Management/Psychology/Applied Psychology/Human Resources Management/Economics/Sociology/Labour Studies/Labour Laws/Business Analytics/Organisational Studies/Organisational Development/Change Management/Leadership/Marketing Management/Financial Management/Operations Management/Strategic Management from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign university. Must have cleared NET/SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (with exemptions for pre-2009 candidates meeting specified conditions). Desirable: PG from premium management institute, Ph.D., 2 years teaching/field practice experience, experience in OD/Change Management/Leadership.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the TISS Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download TISS Assistant Professor Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details
TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: A Master's degree with 55% marks (or equivalent) in Management/Psychology/Applied Psychology/Human Resources Management/Economics/Sociology/Labour Studies/Labour Laws/Business Analytics/Organisational Studies/Organisational Development/Change Management/Leadership/Marketing Management/Financial Management/Operations Management/Strategic Management from an Indian University or equivalent from accredited foreign university. Must have cleared NET/SLET/SET or awarded Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016 (with exemptions for pre-2009 candidates meeting specified conditions). Desirable: PG from premium management institute, Ph.D., 2 years teaching/field practice experience, experience in OD/Change Management/Leadership.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Online Applications

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of TISS to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the TISS Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the TISS Assistant Professor positions is 20 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: A Master's degree with 55% marks in relevant disciplines is required, along with clearing NET/SLET/SET or possessing a Ph.D. as per UGC regulations.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Assistant Professor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Assistant Professor post in the TISS recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the TISS Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000/- for General/OBC candidates and Rs. 250/- for SC/ST candidates. Women candidates are exempt from paying the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 57,700/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official TISS website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this Assistant Professor position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Assistant Professor position is contract-based.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for TISS Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.
